text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hurry, everyone, hurry! We gotta go to that super popular cafe and lock on to some of their coffee jellies for grown-ups!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
No, let's go to the toy store, the toy store! I know
you're all going to love the stuff on sale there,
like Carrot Ranger's awesome ride!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you two are such children. Don't you have
even a sliver of interest in the dark arts like I do?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay, calm down everyone, calm down. Be
patient and we'll go everywhere you'd like to go.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Remember, you mustn't run, okay? Umamusume
can reach considerable speeds, even when we're
just jogging.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: S-sorryyy...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sooorry...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm so proud of you for reflecting on your
actions. ♪ You're such good kids. ♪ There,
there. ♪

text_block_list.name: The Three "Kids"
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today, I'm out shopping in a group of five.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all bumped into each other at the academy
and, after learning we were headed to the same
place, decided to spend the day together.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Let's go to the toy store first! You
know how epic heroes are, right?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
No, the cafe comes first! You understand its
mature appeal, don't you?! Let's touch down at
the cafe for some coffee jelly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko and Mayano pull my arms in opposite
directions, like spoiled children nagging their
parent.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're awfully popular. So, where shall we
go first?
choice_data_list: Let's have some fun at the toy store!
Let's take it easy at the cafe.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Carrot Ranger's new weapon is already
out?! I'm so glad we came here!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what a cute hand mirror! I had no idea they
sold stuff like this!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Such children! I can't believe you're
making such a fuss over a bunch of toys!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her protests, Sweep Tosho's eyes are
locked onto a certain display as she speaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neatly arranged on the display is a selection of
magical girl wands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hoping to distract Sweep Tosho, I glance at
Super Creek, who gives a small nod in response.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Would you like one of those wands, Sweep?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What?! N-no! I don't need something like that!
They're for children!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: They are very cute, but they're also quite cool, don't you think? I think I might like one myself, actually.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Even you like them, Creek?!
choice_data_list: Hey, you two, I just bought a couple of wands!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
W-well since you already bought them, I guess I'll
take one off your hands. Not that I want one of
these or anything...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heeey, that's no fair, Sweep! What about me? I
want this beautiful, grown-up hand mirror!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I want something, too! Carrot Ranger's new
weapon is the coolest, I can't stand it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I soon find myself noticeably poorer, but it feels
quite nice somehow.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you ever so much for today, Trainer.
choice_data_list: I had a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Bleugh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mature coffee jelly that Mayano Top Gun
had her heart set on tastes far more bitter than
she expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tasting the bitter coffee jelly, the three
Umamusume feel suddenly deflated...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this coffee jelly is simply delicious. I almost
want to eat all of yours, too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
choice_data_list: Oh, uh, same! I'd definitely like more!
Oh, uh, same! I'd definitely like more!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hm, but then the three of you would all miss out
on having dessert.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I'll just have to buy new desserts for
all of you. Which would you like?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's my thanks for all this tasty coffee jelly you've
given me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Awesome!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I-I guess if you insist! Here, you can have my
coffee jelly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we successfully protect their taste buds
from a bitter reckoning.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you ever so much for today, Trainer.
choice_data_list: I had a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it really was an enjoyable day.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was so excited and talkative... It was
almost like we were a real family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If those three little rascals are the unruly
children... then that would make me and Super
Creek their—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Creek! Trainer! What are you two doing? You're
gonna get left behind!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, we should hurry. Let's not keep our children waiting. Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Come along, Daddy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Come along, Mommy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm just kidding. ♪
